programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninja receive an invitation to partake in the Tournament of Elements and a clue that Zane might be alive, they accept and travel to a Lost Island owned by notorious crime lord Master Chen in order to save their friend.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: On the island, Lloyd learns that his father used to train under the deceitful Master Chen and when the Ninja meet the playfully deceitful ruler, they realize they are in a tournament where “Only one can remain.”

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In order find Zane, the Ninja stay in the tournament to get past the first round but Chen complicates things by changing the bracket and pitting Jay against Cole.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Chen pits everyone against each other in a ludicrous roller skating event called Thunderblade and all contestants team up against the Ninja.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja have a secret alliance of elemental fighters, Cole has found Zane and Nya is a spy within Chen’s Kabuki to figure out what nefarious plot Chen is up to.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Nya has proof of Chen’s plan but he entices the contestants to hunt her down with promises to advance the winner, forcing the Ninja in a race to get to her first.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After stealing the remaining contestant’s powers, Chen only needs Lloyd’s power to complete the spell and knowing his daughter has feelings for Kai, Chen tries to enlist the Fire Ninja by promising to share secrets about his parents.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The dream chasers feel like they should be taking the fight to the Never Witch instead of training for R.E.M. trials. Zoey's haunted by her most painful memories and Mateo continues to only dream craft Z-Blob-related items.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Set in the past, the dream chaser duo Hannah and Beau argue while young Oz searches for Lunia.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Zoey tries to rebuild a relationship with her estranged dad and Logan steps up his training to beat Astrid.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: A close call with the Never Witch places Mateo in the forests of Wildoria while Beau is on an adventure in the dream world with Zoey.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Zoey and Mateo are trapped in the Grim Realm while Izzie is suspicious of MadTeo's true identity.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: An attack by the Never Witch draws the dream chasers to the Dunes of Duralumina, leaving Nova and Sneak to handle an incursion on their own.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Rock star mathematician Ian Malcolm returns to Isla Nublar and helps Claire, Owen, and Hudson deal with strange power surges all over Jurassic World.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: A Dilophosaurus runs loose in the park's hotel, and Owen and Claire must find it before the guests notice ... and before Vic's dino-hunting security team can damage the hotel and the guests!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Vic and Owen find themselves, along with Sinjin, in the middle of a massive dino-fight in the old Jurassic Park Visitor Center!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: It's déjà vu for Alan Grant as he returns to Isla Nublar and winds up stranded in the jungle during a dangerous storm with injured Simon and hero-worshipping Owen!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Something mysterious lurking in the jungle wrecks a construction site, and Hudson is convinced a ghost is responsible ... but it might be something even more surprising.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Danny releases an energy drink into the dinosaurs' water supply, making them extra-energetic ... and extra dangerous!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Owen falls prey to the toxin of a poisonous prehistoric jungle flower and believes he's a raptor!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: With Destiny’s Bounty impounded, the police hire Ronin to track down the fugitive ninja. Misako has been arrested and is confronted by Nadakhan, who reveals he has trapped Wu in the Teapot of Tyrahn.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: With the ninja imprisoned, Nadakhan uses the Realm Crystal to free his old crew. The ninja encounter Captain Soto, the first captain of the Destiny’s Bounty, who tells them the story of how he originally trapped Nadakhan in the Teapot.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The secret, he says, is the venom of a Tiger Widow, a rare creature that lives on only one island. The venom can slow a djinn down. Soto is the only one who knows where the island is and will only tell if the ninja breaks him out of jail.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Nadakhan vows revenge on the ninja and NINJAGO. The ninja and Soto escape from jail, only to find out the map to the island is on Nadakhan’s ship. Nadakhan discovers that Nya looks just like Delara, his long-lost love.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja’s search for Nadakhan’s ship turns up nothing. Nadakhan’s crew is struggling to handle an airship that used to sail only on the oceans. Nadakhan confronts Jay and talks him into making a wish that will win him Nya.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay reveals to Cole that he made two wishes with Nadakhan. Large chunks of NINJAGO City are disappearing without a trace. The ninja find the Tiger Widow Island on the map but it is an island that exists on no other chart or database.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay is trapped on Nadakhan’s ship, as Nadakhan tries to force him to make his third wish. Lloyd, Cole, and Nya are marooned on Tiger Widow Island.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja are trying to figure out a way to save Jay from Nadakhan’s ship. Two screenwriters, Kevin and Dan, suggest that they build a fake raid zeppelin and disguise themselves as Sky Pirates.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay and Nya have been holed up at the police precinct, but the Sky Pirates track him down. They flee by boat to the lighthouse where Zane’s father was once held captive. Nadakhan learns that the ninja still have the Tiger Widow venom.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Police Chief Wheeler announces the formation of the 700 million dollar Sky Police. Police captain, Tom Bennett, gets a call that his wife has gone into labor early.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú busca ayudar a Don Sebas con su problema de peso, mientras que Peluzín y el Noruego buscan aprovecharse de un afamado cantante del edificio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Mientras que el Abuelo está vuelto loco por encontrar su revista favorita, Peluzín desentierra la verdad sobre su verdadera familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín trata de averiguar el paradero de su madre con la ayuda de sus dos nuevos papás, mientras que Gaspar invita al Abuelo, el Noruego y Johnny a el nuevo restaurante de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y Peluzín buscan lucran aprovechando el próximo paro de agua en la ciudad, mientras que el Noruego nos revela por fin después de tanto tiempo el porque de su miedo al baño.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los Lambreton son los encargados de organizar la fiesta navideña de este año en su casa, mientras que Don Sebas extraña a su país natal y piensa en regresar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo despierta la curiosidad en el Noruego por conocer a su padre y este le pide ayuda a Gaspar para que lo acompañe en esta misión que ha hecho como su única prioridad. Mientras tanto el Abuelo encamina a Jonathan en su despertar sexual.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y mientras esta al filo de la muerte revalora su vida desde sus inicios recordando una parte de su infancia, la que busca esclarecer una vez recuperada su salud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa de manera inesperada con su Némesis de la infancia y junto con Gaspar se embarca en una cruzada para recuperar un objeto muy preciado de manos de su archienemigo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe una visita inesperada con una noticia que le cambiara la vida. Mientras tanto Jonathan le ayuda a Peluzín para prepararse para una prueba muy importante.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una aparición religiosa se manifiesta en el baño del departamento y poco tardan el noruego y el abuelo en encontrarle una ventaja a esta situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo encuentra la manera de aprovecharse del sistema de seguros a costa de Peluzín. Mientras Gaspar les encarga al Noruego y a Jonathan que recojan en el aeropuerto a un familiar que viene de visita de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo sufren un accidente en el desayuno que les trae muchos problemas. Mientras Jonathan necesita el apoyo de su familia para una presentación en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una oda al prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional, con el humor y gran atributo para enfrentar cualquier situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The 100-carat blue diamond, known as Hades' Tear is auctioned off at 1 billion dollars along with its accompanying Hades statue to the KL Foundation of Kingsland. Lupin and Jigen make off with Hades' Tear with ease, but they find out it's only glass.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Mexico's richest woman, Madame Tequila owns a black diamond named the Black Pig of Mexico. Realizing that Lupin is after her diamond, Madame Tequila appoints Inspector Zenigata to guard it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal the Ivanov, the Soviet Union's newest atomic submarine from the Port of Arkhangelsk. Lupin becomes entangled in a fierce tug of war between the KGB and CIA when Fujiko decides to sell it to the highest bidder.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #9 Islands of Assasins

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #10 Tokyo Crisis
programme.desc: When Lupin and his bandit buddies attempt to steal a set of historically significant photographic plates, it turns out they're not the only ones with eyes on the prize in this thievish tale of mayhem and millionaires.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #11 The Columbus Files
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko are after the mysterious treasure known only as Columbus' Egg. Fujiko was able to memorize the Egg's location, but when she's attacked and loses her memory, all seems lost. No one else knows where it is. What's a thief to do?

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #12 Missed by a Dollar

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata arrives in San Marino after receiving a note from Lupin III. Instead of a declaration of a new theft, it's a wedding invitation.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin and the gang managed to steal a fragment of Marie Antoinette's necklace, but Jigen has been captured by Nyx.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: A toothache prompts Jigen to rush to a clinic in a ruined town. The doctor, Livia, says she'll only take a look at him if he'll let her hold on to his gun, so he has no choice but to hand it over.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Fujiko Mine is seen with the members of a failing circus troupe. A former member of the troupe, Tony Belacastro, known as the Magician, died ten years ago, but the secrets to his magic are written in his "Trick Recipes.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: The widow Elena is the only one who knows where her late husband hid his fortune. Zenigata shows up to protect her from Lupin's gang, who are out to steal it from her. Zenigata and Elena go to her mountain retreat to hide from Lupin.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video about how people make chalk. Mayor Maggie reports that all of the vacuum sweepers in Westwood are missing. King Friday assigns Lady Aberlin, Mayor Maggie and Prince Tuesday to find the missing vacuums.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers meets with some children who are making crafts at the Inner City Art Center in Los Angeles. In Make-Believe, Lady Elaine's friends help her conquer her fears.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers and Mr. McFeely look at snow globes and see a film about how people make cereal. King Friday says he is the bravest and strongest in the neighborhood. Cereal is falling like snow. Mister Rogers goes to a Tae Kwon Do class.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers returns a scarf to one of Mr. Brewer's puppets which makes the puppet feel brave and strong. Elsie Jean Platypus tells Lady Abelrin that the cereal quit falling on her because she was not afraid of it.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits the McFeelys, who are watching after young lambs. Handyman Negri and King Friday put on full cereal-proof armor. When their efforts fail, it is clear that Daniel is the only one who can stop the cereal from falling.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers demonstrates how to use tuning whistles. Daniel has the idea to give the cereal to people who might need food. Neighbor Aber brings a forklift to gather all the boxes. Mr. McFeely brings a video about how people make it.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers remembers a time when he visited Jay Styperk, a para-Olympic swimmer. King Friday's crown has gone missing. He hesitantly enters the castle garden, wearing his swimming cap and goggles.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers uses objects from his kitchen to make a horse sculpture. Prince Tuesday is dressed in a lion costume and startles Mayor Maggie. He explains that wearing the costume helps him feel brave about looking for his father's crown.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely delivers a video about how people make apple juice. King Friday suggests that Lady Aberlin start looking for his missing crown at the Museum-Go-Round.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a fish sculpted from the paper by his friend Ben Gonzales. Edgar Cooke shares with Lady Aberlin that his refrigerator and food are gone. She finds it, along with King Friday's crown and the Westwood sign.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Bill Nye, “the Science Guy” stops by to show a science experiment using baking soda and vinegar to blow up a balloon. Mister Rogers shows a video of dump trucks at a construction site, and in Make-Believe, all that was lost is found.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Magician David Copperfield teaches Mister Rogers how to do a magic trick. It takes lots of practice. In Make-Believe, X is giving flying lessons, and there's a video of what the world looks like from a bird's point of view.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Prince Tuesday is upset about being unable to fly, so Lady Elaine gives him a propeller hat. He jumps off the castle wall, thinking the hat will make him fly, and injures his arm. Mister Rogers visits the Uptown String Quartet.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: X says he is feeling guilty about Prince Tuesday's fall. Neighbor Aber says it was not X's flying lessons that made Prince Tuesday get hurt. Mister Rogers shows a video about people making sleeping bags. He visits the workshop of the doll maker.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Hula-hoop expert Paul Tifford gives Mister Rogers some lessons. It takes a lot of practice to be able to use a hula-hoop well, and falling and getting up again are a part of learning!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Instead of changing into a sweater as he typically does, Mister Rogers puts on a vest made by his friend Saihou Njie. Trolley brings a batik cloth to Handyman Negri, who then gives it to King Friday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a children's plastic potty, takes it to his bathroom and compares it to the adult-sized toilet. Prince Tuesday comes up with a game using a bucket but has had his feelings hurt when his father was not impressed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: King Friday denounces the magic finder balloon. Neighbors Aber and Robert Troll are looking for Lady Elaine. They find her locked in a room of the Museum-Go-Round. At Mister Rogers' house, Levar Burton reads “The Daddy Book.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers explains how a wheelchair lift works, and then shows one in action. He shows some of his puppets. Mayor Maggie and Neighbor Aber ride in a wheelchair until they have their checkups from Dr. Bill.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits with Koko the gorilla, who has learned how to communicate in sign language. In Make-Believe, there's a gorilla, too, who seems scary until the neighbors get to know him. And there's a video of how people make play balls.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At the eye doctor's office, Mister Rogers takes part in a general eye examination. The gorilla catches Lady Aberlin as she stumbles, which alarms Lady Elaine Fairchild. Lady Elaine is determined to catch the gorilla.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely stops by with a film about a service dog aiding a handicapped child. Mister Rogers visits with the boy from the video and his dog. Lady Elaine Fairchile continues her efforts to catch the gorilla. Neighbor Aber is missing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers reads a book about a dog named Zak. There's also a video visit to the Center for Creative Play, a place where children of all abilities can play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: City Confidential

programme.title: City Confidential
programme.desc: An 11-year old girl goes missing on her way home from a Halloween party in Oil City, PA. and it shocks the close-knit community.

programme.title: City Confidential
programme.desc: Apple Creek is an Amish Country village that's a throwback to another time. When a young mother of five is found shot to death in her home, an investigation is launched, and a private community finds itself at the center of a murder case.

programme.title: City Confidential
programme.desc: Three employees are gunned down inside one of Washington D.C.'s favorite brunch spots. Residents are gripped with fear as detectives hunt for the shooter, only to find a group of greedy assassins with a personal vendetta.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: The parents of 11 yr. old Brittany Martinez knew their daughter was no runaway. Something had happened to her, something terrible. When they failed to find Brittany in their quiet Illinois neighborhood, they called the police.

programme.title: The FBI Files

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In Arizona, an armored van loaded with cash failed to reach its destination. Authorities suspected an inside job. When the vehicle was recovered with the drivers and the cash missing, those suspicions grew even more.

programme.title: Engine Masters

programme.title: Engine Masters
programme.desc: The last time the guys took on hydraulic and solid roller lifters, every answer generated more questions; now they'll try different combinations, then figure out what makes sense and what the consequences are for power and wear.

programme.title: Engine Masters
programme.desc: The crew tests the effects of running long vs. short rods on otherwise identical engines; they'll find out if long rods make more torque, if shorter rods' faster swipe makes a difference, or if rod length doesn't actually matter.

programme.desc: The gang heads to a food convention, but things go awry when they become stranded in the woods; SpongeBob accidentally fibs to his pen pal, but when his friend comes to visit, he must keep the ruse going.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When SpongeBob hides the secret krabby patty formula in his home, Gary must protect it from Plankton; Sandy must save the day when a freak accident causes everyone in town to become as stupid as Patrick.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When a storm sweeps the Krusty Krab away, the crew and customers must rely on a crazed Krabs to lead them back home; Patrick's last baby tooth needs to come out, but he fears letting it go.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get hooked on the latest fad, flying your own brain like a tiny drone; SpongeBob and Patrick have fun playing as superheroes Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy until their sworn enemies arrive.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When SpongeBob thinks he has an allergy to his pineapple, Squidward offers to help find him a new home; Squidward gets a nose job at the local hospital and SpongeBob tags along as moral support.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob learns that imitation is the sincerest form of flattery; when worms move in to SpongeBob's holes, he has to hide his disgusting new friends from everyone else.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward is so tired that SpongeBob and Patrick are unable to wake him up, but they do not want him to miss his big audition; Mr. Krabs and his crew cater a fancy party, but they might be out of their depth with their new wealthy customers.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs' customers abandon him when SpongeBob starts cooking at home; when Plankton gets kicked out of the house, SpongeBob must teach him how to win his computer wife back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: After a misunderstanding, SpongeBob and Patrick try to prove their life insurance protects them from any danger; when SpongeBob blows himself a bubble boat, everyone in town starts to want one.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja ordena unas armas falsas; Calamardo finge ser un fantasma.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja lleva a la hija de Don Cangrejo al baile escolar. Bob Esponja y Calamardo compiten por ser el empleado del mes.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: En `SB-129', Calamardo accidentalmente se encuentra a sí mismo en el futuro, y para su sorpresa extraña a Bob Esponja, luego en `Karate Choppers', Bob Esponja y Sandy descubren el karate.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: En `Sleepy Time' Bob Esponja visita los sueños de sus amigos y vecinos. Mientras que en `Suds', Bob Esponja llega con una enfermedad que lo transforma en fabricante de burbujas.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Don Cangrejo convence a Bob Esponja y Patricio de unirse a él en una búsqueda del tesoro. Bob Esponja se sube al autobús equivocado.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja deja a todo el mundo enojado con sus bromas del Día de los Inocentes; Bob Esponja tiene el reto de cocinar para el Rey Neptuno y decide participar en un concurso entre cocineros.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Don Cangrejo advierte a SpongeBob que se mantenga alejado de los anzuelos; Bob Esponja convoca a su héroes favoritos para las emergencias.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja tiene que lidiar con unas peligrosas bombas-tartas piratas; luego, Plankton construye un falso Don Cangrejo para obtener la receta de Krabby Patty.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja inventa hamburguesas con colores; Sandy pone a Bob Esponja y a Patricio a cuidar de su oruga.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja se pregunta si se puede ser grande y todavía besar a su abuela; Calamardo se muda de Fondo de Bikini.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja se esconde de Sandy; Bob Esponja y Patricio piden prestado un globo de una tienda y accidentalmente lo revientan.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Patricio se cuelan en Treedome; Gary sigue a Patricio por los alrededores y Bob Esponja se pone celoso.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: La Sra. Puff hará cualquier cosa para asegurarse que Bob Esponja pase su examen de manejo y Bob Esponja descubre que su héroe no es tan importante.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: SpongeBob cuenta chistes maliciosos; SpongeBob falla su examen de conducir; SpongeBob cuida el hogar de Mermaid Man y Barnacle Boy.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja sigue a Arenita en una serie de actividades extremas; luego, Bob Esponja trata de ocultar lo que le hizo a una ostra en el zoológico.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja va a trabajar para Plankton; Bob Esponja crea un GarabatoEsponja, quien le juega bromas a todo el mundo, obligando a Bob Esponja a borrarlo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja no soporta que Patricio no le diga qué hay dentro de la caja; Calamardo, Bob Esponja y la pandilla forman su propia banda de música.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Mientras trabaja en el turno de la noche, Calamardo le cuenta a Bob Esponja una historia de miedo acerca de un asesino.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja intenta escribir un ensayo de 800 palabras antes del amanecer; Patrick trata de impresionar a sus padres en el día de las estrellas de mar.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja lee una palabra soez y no sabe lo que significa, pero la repite. Bob Esponja se inscribe en una clase de arte que imparte Calamardo, pero él es un profesor arrogante y quiere seguir las explicaciones del libro al pie de la letra.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Pat consigue un trabajo en el Chum Bucket y compite con Bob Esponja en los juegos Fry Cook; Bob Esponja lleva una manada de medusas al Sr. Cangrejo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Como Don Cangrejo es injusto con sus empleados, Bob Esponja y Calamardo deciden hacer una huelga. Una lombriz aterroriza Fondo de Bikini.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja se ofrece como salvavidas. Además, Plankton inventa una máquina que le permite cambiar de vida con don Cangrejo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Calamardo no está permitido en la casa del árbol de Bob Esponja y Patricio; luego, Bob Esponja adopta un caballito de mar, y se lo lleva por todas partes.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja descubre que Calamardo nunca ha probado una Krabby Patty; y luego, Bob Esponja es preocupado por un nuevo alumno en la escuela de canotaje.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Don Cangrejo y Bob Esponja ocultan el cuerpo de un inspector de sanidad; Bob Esponja y Patricio tiran su nueva TV y conservan la caja.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Patricio le muestran a Calamardo una ó dos cosas acerca de la nieve en `The Snowball Effect', y en `One Krab's Trash', el Sr Krabs accidentalmente vende un sombrero valioso a Bob Esponja.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: El estrellato se sube a la cabeza de Bob Esponja después de que él aparece en el comercial de bajo presupuesto del Crustáceo Cascarudo; Calamardo se empobrece.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja intenta convencer a un portero de que él es suficientemente fuerte para entrar a la Escupidera de Salty. El archienemigo de Calamardo regresa.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: Anthony Bourdain finds Toronto has a surprising and diverse food scene.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: Tony takes on his hometown of New York City.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: Tony has a layover in Amsterdam which leads to unexpected adventures.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: Tony heads to Atlanta for a generous helping of Southern hospitality.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: Anthony Bourdain does as the French do and indulges in a duck press.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: Tony cruises around in the baddest car he can find to take on Chicago.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: A sharkskin suit adds a twist to Tony's Hong Kong layover.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: Local friends expose Tony to the wild, exciting, proud culture of Montreal.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: Tony Bourdain discovers Dublin has a thriving food scene and the best bars.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: Via Vespa, trolley tracks and by foot, Tony dives into Roman culture.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: In New Orleans, Tony indulges in fresh crab and shrimp and drinks Sazerac.

programme.title: The Layover with Anthony Bourdain
programme.desc: From Koreatown to the Chateau Marmont, Anthony professes his love for LA.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Kendra is on a mission to save her from her toxic boyfriend Chris. At 17, Kendra is pregnant with his sixth child. Kendra has tried almost everything including kicking him out of their house, but he not only argued back but assaulted Kendra as well.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Eugene and Kendra are tired of being harassed by Simone, his ex, who alleges he fathered her 3 children. While he does admit to sleeping with her, he denies the kids because he says she slept around! What will the DNA test results say?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Jeremiah says that his 14-year-old female client's mom agreed to the tattoo, but girlfriend Nikki can't shake off her 13-year-old sister's accusations against him. Then will Brandon's wife take him back after he attacked her?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Josh and Amy will find out today that their partners have been unfaithful. Next Madeline reveals to Andre that she's been sleeping with Diante. Then Quincy is engaged to Callie but she doesn't know that Quincy has been cheating with Amy.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: John weighs almost 700 pounds and couldn't be happier. HIs girlfriend Kim goes so far as to make him choose between her and a 10-foot long sandwich! He chooses the sandwich.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Kitty came to the show to pose nude for our audience and a camera man while "fooling around" with her friend, Naomi! Next Gee is here to finally get even with her sister, Jenny, for sleeping with her man.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Michele forces her boyfriend to choose between her and his mistress Morgan. Then Rose wants her husband's mistress, Denise, to back off. But there's a catch! Next Dena is here to tell her boyfriend that she's found someone to give her attention.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Chloe and Dan will tie the knot soon, but she’s finally ready to tell him about her real job. Then Amanda’s mom begs her to quit her job.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Amy is here to confront her husband, Fury's, ex-mistress, Shauna, for continuing to butt into their lives. Shauna says she loves Fury but admits that she's been sleeping with her cousin, Becky! Then Becky reveals to all that she slept with Fury!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Desiree and Kim have been dating Chango for 6 years! Next Mark's ex wants him back and even lied about a pregnancy. Today she will be confronted by Mark and his new girlfriend!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Whilst in jail, Scooter asked his dad, Richard, if his wife, Keri, and their child could move in with him, but he didn't expect Keri and Richard to fall in love!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Sarah's here for Jonathan. The only problem is Lana, her best friend, who just happens to be Jonathan's girlfriend. Next Kung-fu family feud! David's here to let his brother, Lil Wayne, know that he has been sleeping with his girlfriend Ashley.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Ray has been playing both his wife and his girlfriend! His lovers will face off and finally force him to stop the two-timing. Then, Julie suspects that her boyfriend may be fooling around with, Shauna, a young, fellow waitress from work.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Spirited Betty is in love with Greg, a married man, and is here to break up his home and steal him from his wife, Kirsten. Then Christina says her boyfriend, Sean, does everything she wants except he won't stop sleeping with Megan!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Lanikka está harta de los abusos de su novio Malcom. Después, los celos de Tim han destrozado su familia, pero ahora está desesperado por recuperarlos, ¿Tiffany lo dejará definitivamente?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Desde que Chris tenía 3 meses, su abuela Anne lo crió y le dijo que su madre Hollie era abusiva y que trató de lastimarlo. Ahora Chris y Hollie se van a conocer por primera vez en nuestro escenario.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: LaShawna y su novio James sabrán si su amiga Coral lastimó a su hijo hace años. También admitirá que ella le fue infiel con Coral. ¿Cómo reaccionará él cuando descubra otro bombazo?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Buddy pasa sus días fumando y jugando a los videojuegos, en lugar de mantener a su familia. Su novia Holly trabaja para mantenerlos a todos, incluyendo a su hijo que tiene necesidades especiales, ¡pero está harta!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Lainie y Justin tienen un bebé de 9 meses juntos. Justin lastima a Lainie porque cree que ella es infiel. ¿Pero cómo reaccionará Steve cuando se enfrente a Justin?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¿Quién es responsable del bienestar del pequeño Noel? Todo el mundo puede negar las acusaciones, pero alguien sabe qué pasó, y Steve va a obtener explicaciones.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Kendra tiene la misión de salvarla de su novio tóxico Chris. A los 17 años, Kendra está embarazada de su sexto hijo. Kendra lo ha intentado casi todo, incluso echarlo de su casa, pero no solamente se defendió, sino que también golpeó a Kendra.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Sheroya tiene 17 años y se esfuerza por criar a 2 niños mientras sale de fiesta sin parar. Su novio Malcolm suele ser infiel y la maltrata verbalmente. Steve tiene mucho trabajo por delante con esta pareja, pero ¿alguno de ellos despertará?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¿Everett tocó a la hija de su novia Michelle? Su ex Robert dice que su hija de 7 años lo contó. ¡Everett se someterá a una prueba con el detector de mentiras para desmentirlo! ¡No te pierdas estos resultados impactantes!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¿Marlo tocó a su hija con Sandra cuando ella tenía 7 años? Ha evitado confrontarla durante casi 10 años, pero hoy, Sandra no se irá hasta que no se sepa la verdad y se haga justicia por su hija.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Steve está celebrando otra reunión de chicas adolescentes para tratar los problemas más importantes a los que se pueden enfrentar todas las adolescentes, incluyendo el uso de drogas, el abuso físico y los agresores en Internet.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Sherry fue atacada a los 15 años y se escapó de su casa. Quiere que Steve la ayude a reunirse con su madre. Después, la hija adolescente de Dawn, Cathy, dio a luz recientemente, pero vive asustada por el desempleado e inestable padre del bebé, Nick.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¡Kristy quiere que su madre, Donna, le devuelva su bebé! Donna afirma que se llevó al bebé porque nació con graves discapacidades debido a que Kristy consumió drogas durante el embarazo. ¿Quién está mintiendo?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Aeshia ha venido a demostrar a Terrence y a su esposa Lashondra que Terrence es el padre de su hijo, pero Lashondra sabe que se equivoca. Tanto Shaunah como Chris se han convencido de que les son infieles. ¿Quién es el padre?

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Gertrudis culpa a Willy de querer asesinarla. Todas las pruebas lo acusan como ella planeó forzar a Mariana a casarse con Martin y así Willy sufre, a cambio de no meterlo en la cárcel.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Mariana se ve obligada por Gertrudis a pedirle a Martin que se case con ella o de lo contrario enviará a Willy a prisión. Martin acepta, aun sabiendo que solo se casa con él para salvar a Willy.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Willy no puede convencer a Mariana de que casarse con Martin es un error con el que sufrirá enormemente. Gertrudis tranquiliza a Luciano al decirle que retirará la demanda contra Willy.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: La boda de Rafael y Claudia se va a realizar y todos se están presentes, Eduarda tiene planes de matar a Rosaura con el veneno que le compró a la vidente.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Esther le pide a Mercedes que se tranquilice, que ella le va a decir quien es su hijo pero que debe jurarle que nunca se acercará a él. Mercedes se lo jura.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: A su llegada del entierro de Rafael, Doña Cruz se enfrenta con Patricio, quien la llena de preguntas sobre Luis Mario.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario conduce a Rosaura a un paraíso lleno de flores, en donde los dos se olvidan de su sufrimiento para dar rienda suelta a su deseo de estar para siempre juntos.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Fedora le pide a su abogado que defienda a Gaby en el juicio para evitar que sea condenada. Deborah se encuentra con Maximiliano y Diana en el mismo hospital donde ella se encuentra.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Al hacer el intento de mediar con Diana para entregarle a su hijo, Isabel se ve interrumpida por la llegada de la policía a su casa. Paola enfrenta a Octavia por mantenerla encerrada en contra de su voluntad.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Al saber del paradero de su hijo, Diana se apresura y le llama a Maximiliano. Marfil le pide a Octavia que la ayude una vez más para no perder a Maximiliano. Octavia y Marfil visitan a Bruna en el hospital.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Diana se enfrenta a Maximiliano nuevamente al enterarse por Marfil que ellos quieren quedarse con su hijo. Paco se pone celoso al conocer a Rodrigo.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Para su pesar, Martin finalmente acepta que Mariana ponga fin a su compromiso con él. Hilary confiesa a Elena que fue su hijo el que Matilda abortó cuando se negó a casarse con ella.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Gertrudis culpa a Willy de querer asesinarla. Todas las pruebas lo acusan como ella planeó forzar a Mariana a casarse con Martin y así Willy sufre, a cambio de no meterlo en la cárcel.

programme.title: Amor comprado

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Pica loses his temper and turns his full wrath against King Riku, whom he hopes to destroy, ending the revolution against Doflamingo. Meanwhile, Zoro, who has been distracted by Pica and drawn far from the battle, has to hatch a plan to save the king!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With the lives of King Riku, Usopp, and the others on the old King's Plateau in the balance, Zoro must dig deep and discover a powerful technique to counter Pica's near-unstoppable onslaught. Meanwhile, King Riku ponders what it means to be a good king.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro finishes off Pica, and those below his crumbling body rush to find shelter. Meanwhile, the Tontattas finish up demolishing the SMILE Factory, and Luffy's hand is forced in his duel with Bellamy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Taking down Bellamy only enrages Luffy in his fight against Doflamingo, his anger multiplying when he finds Law's lifeless body! Meanwhile, Doflamingo takes the next step to end the game he started, which will endanger everybody in Dressrosa!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Birdcage draws tighter and tighter around Dressrosa, threatening to destroy all life on the island kingdom! Meanwhile, Doflamingo stands down Luffy for a final confrontation, but a surprising twist shocks everyone on the top of the Royal Palace!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law's attack proves powerful - but Doflamingo's power has depths which he and Luffy haven't bargained for. When Doflamingo makes his counterattack, Luffy stares him down with an amazing power.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Trebol's wrath is fully inflamed as Law summons enough energy to speak, denouncing the Doflamingo Family executives as pawns in Doflamingo's game. But Law gathers enough energy to do more than just speak out.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Cavendish has to make a difficult decision when the severely wounded Law begs him to be left behind. Meanwhile, seeing even his Second Gear or Third Gear attacks aren't working against Doflamingo, Luffy decides to use his ultimate technique!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Doflamingo duke it out while the Birdcage tightens its grip on Dressrosa! Zoro sets off with a plan to stop it from slicing apart the country, while Luffy's Fourth Gear proves quite potent against Doflamingo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Birdcage continues its merciless constriction, sending the residents of Dressrosa fleeing towards the center of the island, while King Riku calls out to his people: Survive long enough for Luffy to vanquish the last of the royal family.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Fourth Gear gives Luffy the power he needs to head off Doflamingo at every strike! But the energy required to keep Fourth Gear going starts to take a toll on Luffy. Will he have enough left to finish the job?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Bounce-man's power has drained Luffy, leaving him in need of a rest before he can reuse his Haki, but luckily the gladiators from the Colosseum have come around and are focusing on taking down Doflamingo! Sabo steps in at a crucial moment.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With Luffy and so many of the Straw Hats' allies incapacitated, victory seems inevitable for Doflamingo - but the compassion of Mansherry may be enough to turn the tide and renew their hope - to stop the Birdcage!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With just over a minute to spare, everyone in Dressrosa turns their efforts towards slowing down the Birdcage as it squeezes the life out of the country! Meanwhile, Viola seeks Doflamingo out herself, for a shocking confrontation!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Only a bit more time remains before Luffy returns to the scene! But as time slips by, those who had been roused by Princess Mansherry's powers begin to falter! Meanwhile, Rebecca, under the control of Doflamingo, is about to attack Viola!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy regains enough Haki to face off against Doflamingo, but his health is still poor. With the Birdcage closing in, is there a technique left in his repertoire that is strong enough to take down Doflamingo?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With Doflamingo thoroughly quashed and the Birdcage collapsing, the people of Dressrosa shed tears of joy remembering the hardships they've endured, and the actions taken by Luffy and the others to free them.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Jesus Burgess of the Blackbeard Pirates tries to agitate Sabo, mocking Ace's final words in order to unsettle him enough that he can try to steal the Flare-Flare Fruit! Meanwhile, people of Dressrosa beg King Riku to resume the crown.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Repercussions of Doflamingo's defeat reverberate around the world! Fujitora's actions put the Navy in a tight spot, and the "Worst Generation" beings to stir into action!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The combatants in the battle for Dressrosa can finally begin to recoup, but those who stay awake are treated to the story of how Sabo joined the Revolutionary Army!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sabo recounts his surprising reunion with Luffy at the Colosseum as the Straw Hats and the others continue to recoup. Meanwhile, Fujitora gambles on how to make his next move - and the odds are in Luffy's favor!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As Sabo departs, our attention shifts to the other Straw Hats waging a fierce battle on a mysterious island. And a new drama is set into motion as ill portents fall from the sky!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As Luffy and the others begin to come to their senses, major players in the Navy arrive to search Dressrosa for the Straw Hats! Also, Rebecca's history is whitewashed with a fake cover story - but why?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Fujitora's flirting with chance has turned out poorly for the Straw Hats as the full Navy force bears down on Dressrosa searching for the pirates! Luffy and the others make a mad dash for the east port to get off the island.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Rebecca has precious little time to follow Luffy's lead and make it to Kyros. Can she make it in time? Meanwhile, Fujitora is closing in on Bartolomeo and the other Colosseum warriors while Trafalgar Law faces the shadows of his past!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law and Sengoku share memories of Corazon, and the secret of Trafalgar Law's name. Meanwhile, Fujitora uses the destruction caused by the battle in Dressrosa as a weapon, and squares off one-on-one with Luffy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The people of Dressrosa show their appreciation to the Straw Hats one last time by foiling Fujitora's strategy. As Luffy and the others are able to finally make their break from the island, however, an unbelievable new chapter opens in the story.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash and Pablo realize the rift in the cellar is the key to saving humanity, and devise a plan to save the ones they love.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead

programme.desc: When multiple victims' bodies are dumped around Louisiana's bayou area, a task force is formed to catch a killer who police believe may have strangled over 20 men.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Police in Hartford, Conn., investigate a string of ruthless killings in the Asylum Hill area committed by a killer with a devastating mark that leaves his victims nearly unrecognizable.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A serial sniper terrorizes the entire D.C. metro area by discreetly targeting random victims out in public and in plain sight.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In 1990, a serial killer terrorizes the University of Florida's campus, killing five students in under four days; the Gainesville Ripper leaves behind a crime scene where all the victims have been stabbed but the females have been posed like dolls.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In New Jersey four bodies are found dismembered, bagged, and thrown in roadside garbage cans; the "Last Call Killer" hunted his victims openly in piano bars but no one suspected he could be hiding in plain sight, working as a local nurse.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Dallas police discover three women murdered with their eyes surgically removed; police believe they have a deranged doctor on the loose until two rookie cops find themselves on the trail of a man with a talent for taxidermy and a hatred for women.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer

programme.desc: Paul and Jimmy rescue a gator, and Tre starts gator wrestling classes.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions

programme.title: Fatal Attractions

programme.title: Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear skydives from a cargo plane into Australia's Northern Territory.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy unfurl an elaborate sting when they repo a taxicab by tricking its driver into picking them up. But what to do with his ferociously inebriated client?

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.desc: The remaining participants are worn thin as starvation and isolation become unbearable. One man faces a potentially deadly situation.

programme.desc: Five former champions return for a competition unlike any other and must earn a spot at one of the four anvils to compete for the Ultimate Champion of Champions.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: When a high-profile U.S. Senator with a wealthy father goes missing, Jack and the team are forced to do their jobs under intense scrutiny from the media and the government.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a teenage girl who disappeared after trying to dodge the advances of an aggressive boy. Meanwhile, Samantha's estranged sister attempts to reconnect with her.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Samantha secretly searches for her missing sister, Emily, with only the aid of the local police. But when Jack finds out about Emily's abduction, he insists that the team get involved.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for an interracial couple's six-year-old son, who was kidnapped from a farmer's market as his mother briefly looked away to make a purchase.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a stuntman who went missing shortly after completing a dangerous, fiery stunt. They discover that he received a death threat minutes before he vanished from the film set.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: After signing paperwork ordering a violent husband to vacate his home, beleaguered divorce-court judge Chris Manning (LOREN DEAN) disappears.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a teenage girl who vanished during her high school prom. Witnesses reported that the girl left the festivities to rest alone in her hotel room upstairs.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: A woman with information about the death of Maggie's husband is abducted leading the team to uncover a criminal operation larger than anyone imagined.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a bomb detonates at a restaurant in Queens, the case becomes personal for OA, who grew up eating there.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After the son of a prominent Mommy blogger is kidnapped, the team must sweep through her two million followers to find the culprit.

programme.desc: A frightening journey into the unknown awaits an Earthbound scout ship when it comes across an alien spacecraft of enormous proportions. Further investigation reveals a roomful of glass coffins containing the bodies of frozen creatures.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Mild ‘N Wooly
programme.desc: When an unruly herd of Mareep ruin their lunch plans, our heroes decide to help their timid herder in time to compete in a local battle festival.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Wired For Battle
programme.desc: When the top student at a Pokémon training center loses interest in Pokémon battles, opting to build a comprehensive Pokémon database instead, it’s up to Ash to convince him that battling is not just about probability!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Good ‘Quil Hunting
programme.desc: When Ash finds a Cyndaquil in the wild, he is eager to catch it...but you can bet he’s not the only one!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: A Shadow Of A Drought
programme.desc: Arriving in Azalea Town, Ash carelessly provokes its residents, who adore SlowPoké. And things only look worse as Team Rocket arrives, meaning to snag every last SlowPoké! What can Ash do?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Going Apricorn
programme.desc: As he promised Professor Oak, Ash delivers the mysterious GS Ball to a renowned Poké Ball expert. But the fruits of his labor are almost spoiled when Team Rocket bursts onto the scene!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Gettin’ The Bugs Out
programme.desc: Ash has finally reached the Azalea Gym, but Cyndaquil isn’t quite fired up enough to take on the Gym Leader. As the battle heats up, Ash has to give his all to take on the powerful Bug-type Pokémon!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: A Farfetch’d Tale
programme.desc: An inexperienced young Trainer has managed to scare off his own Farfetch’d. Our heroes are happy to help him out, but they'll have to find it before Team Rocket does!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Tricks Of The Trade
programme.desc: At an annual Pokémon trading festival, a young Trainer is looking for a good trade for his Wobbuffet. The Team Rocket trio are looking for opportunities as well, but both sets of Trainers get more than they bargain for!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: The Fire-Ing Squad!
programme.desc: An unexpected Pokémon firefighting competition reunites our heroes with some old friends, the Squirtle Squad! But they are in desperate need of some leadership, so Ash and Squirtle rejoin the ranks.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: No Big Woop!
programme.desc: When they stumble upon a preschool for Wooper and an emergency calls the teacher away, our heroes come to the rescue! But, as always, Team Rocket is around the corner and up to no good…

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Tunnel Vision
programme.desc: On the way to Goldenrod City, our heroes are forced to head through a tunnel guarded by angry Onix. To make it more difficult, Team Rocket, Snubbull, and Jigglypuff drop in for a visit…

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Hour Of Houndour
programme.desc: Following a string of mysterious thefts, our heroes discover some Houndour struggling to survive in the wild. To help these thieving Pokémon mend their ways, Ash and friends will first have to earn their trust.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: The Totodile Duel
programme.desc: Ash and Misty’s rivalry is reignited when they both try to capture a Totodile at the same time. Unable to see whose Poké Ball actually caught it, they decide a battle is the best way to decide Totodile’s new Trainer.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Hot Matches
programme.desc: When Ash hears of a virtually unbeatable Trainer nearby, he's itching to take on the challenge. But both Brock’s Vulpix and Ash’s Cyndaquil take a beating from her Skarmory, even with their type advantage! How can Ash defeat it?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Love, Totodile Style
programme.desc: Ash’s Totodile develops a crush on a passing Azumarill, the star performer of a Pokémon circus. When Team Rocket arrives to steal the show, Azumarill’s heart isn't the only thing Totodile has to win!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Fowl Play
programme.desc: Ash has his sights set on a rare Noctowl with unusual coloring, but this clever Pokémon repeatedly uses Hypnosis to get the better of him! Will Ash be able to catch this Noctowl napping?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Forrest Grumps
programme.desc: A surprise attack from a group of Ursaring has our heroes and Team Rocket running for cover. In the chaos, the groups are split up, and the unenthusiastic pairings are forced to work together. But for how long?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: The Psychic Sidekicks

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: The Fortune Hunters
programme.desc: A sudden craze in Pokémon fortune-telling turns out to be a plot to steal Pokémon from local Trainers. But Jessie, James and Meowth aren't behind it this time! Who are these con artists?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Arriving in Goldenrod City, Ash is ready for his next Gym battle, but the Gym appears to be closed. Their plans delayed, our heroes decide to explore the vibrant city.

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora se aferra a Juan como su última salvación, desesperada ataca a Fernando, quien le dispara y ve cómo el cuerpo de ella se pierde en el pantano. Rosario se disculpa con Franco y Sara.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Aníbal, el tío de los Reyes, se encarga de organizar la expedición de rescate, lo acompañan Franco, Óscar y la policía. A Juan se le agudiza el dolor de la pierna y Fernando se va por su lado.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Hugo está en un estado de conmoción, Daniel averigua si su sangre tiene el componente para salvarse de la catalepsia, y Michelle aprovecha para acercarse. Arturo recibe una dolorosa noticia.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Los inversionistas quieren recuperar su dinero a toda costa, pero Arturo se debate entre la vida y la muerte. Alcides cree saber quién esconde a Hugo, Soledad y Michelle tratan de engañarlo.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Alcides tiene un plan definido para ganar la confianza de Soledad, pero no sabe lo que está por descubrir. Daniel llega al laboratorio de Max para analizar si Aurora puede curarse.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Hugo muestra su gratitud con Michelle y está ansioso por saber los resultados de las pruebas de Aurora. Esther presiona a Lucas, quiere saber el porqué de su reacción ante el fraude de la mina.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro sorprende a Rodrigo a punto de entrar al cuarto de Antonia. Max enfurece cuando ve a su madre con Gastón, busca a Valentina y sale golpeado. Alejandro lo salva. Antonia invierte en la bolsa y pierde dos millones de dólares de su hijastra.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: El testimonio de Gertrudis no tendrá valor por su estado mental. Ella le advierte a Alejandro que él será el motivo por el cual las patronas acabarán con el pueblo. Rodrigo cae en la tentación. Gastón hace campaña para las elecciones de San Pedro.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica y Antonia están temerosas por la confesión de Gertrudis. Ricardo siente que avanza en la terapia y aunque llega a casa con mucha pasión, no logra hacer el amor con Patricia. Antonia está loca por Rodrigo. Lucho entra en la casa de Verónica.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he meets the lucky creatures that are cared for by some of the most interesting veterinarians from across the world. Koalas, Cheetahs, Gorillas, Dogs, Eland, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as meets creatures battling back and returning to the wild. Manatees, Bald Eagles, Sea Turtles, Crowned Cranes and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack's on a mission in Kenya and he's heading straight for the world's largest land mammals -- African elephants and white rhinos! Jack never forgets the little guys, join in as he uncovers some delicate and vital relationships in the animal kingdom.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for a rescue mission and meet the charismatic animals that were spared from the brink. Dolphins, Dogs, Asian Elephants, Horses, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he counts down six of nature’s spectacularly scary stories, like the toxic king cobra, the gargantuan griffon vulture, a cockroach-infested bat cave, a real-life dragon, and more wickedly wild creatures!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jack for a world tour of fun and fascinating baby animals!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as meets creatures that have some of the sunniest dispositions on Earth. Hippos, Marine Iguanas, African Penguins, Galapagos Tortoises and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack goes behind the scenes of the International Anti-Poaching Foundation to see how they are bringing paramilitary techniques to the front lines of conservation in a fight to protect Africa's rhinos.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack visits the world's largest crocodile farm and assists in the capture of a 14-foot reptilian destined for a Thailand education center.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and his family search everywhere for chimpanzees in Rwanda's Nyungwe Forest. They get up close and personal with some colobus monkeys and Jack meets an old friend who is pioneering a conservation effort for the local women.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Home Turf
programme.desc: Meet the animals that are masters of their domain. These creatures know how to protect their territories and themselves. Hippos, elephants, guanacos, elephant seals and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack visits a breeding project focused on saving the endangered condor, the largest flying bird in the world. With its unique location in the middle of prime condor habitat, “condor Hausi” hopes to reproduce the massive bird in captivity.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Gabon's pristine habitats are prime for primates! Come along as Jungle Jack meets up with conservationists to learn about the future of primates big and small, including Chimpanzees, Gorillas, Mandrills and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for his all-time favorite animal adventures in the wild! The Great Migration, Mountain Gorillas, Elephants, Mandrills and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack's daughter travels to British Columbia to catch sight of the Vancouver Island Marmot, one of the rarest mammals on earth. Meanwhile on Salt Spring Island, Jungle Jack visits a rehab center specializing in the holistic care of native animals.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along for an epic adventure to the tropical Caribbean Island of Curacao! Join Jungle Jack as he braves a deep diving Submarine, encounters Dolphins on the high seas, and rolls up his sleeves for Coral Reef Conservation.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Today, Jungle Jack is in Zambia getting an up-close look at some of the toughest reptiles on the planet – fierce and dangerous Nile Crocodiles! Then he takes a walk on the wild side with white rhino, giraffe, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Guayaquil, Jack and his daughter Kathaleen visit a park in the mangroves that preserves Ecuador's rural culture, as well as many of the country's endangered animals, including harpy eagle, tapir, tigerill and ocelot.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: South Africa is the place for seeing the biggest and most recognizable animals in all of Africa. So today, Jack is heading straight to the famous Shamwari Game Reserve for up-close encounters with elephants, rhinos, lions, and the rest of the Big Five!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and his family are visiting a few of the special people that are doing their part to make a difference. From protecting the world's largest land mammal to the fastest…check out the story of the Knysna Elephant Park and Cheetah Outreach Center.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack journeys to Nairobi where he and Sue learn to care for baby elephant orphans at a truly groundbreaking animal nursery. Then they come face to face with some of the country's tallest citizens – the endangered Rothschild giraffe.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: Ever wonder how Jungle Jack manages to track down all of his animal stories? Today you'll see high-tech gear, and good ole-fashioned know-how in action, as he tracks down six surprising stories from the safari trail. Elephants, wild dogs and koalas!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Monkey Business
programme.desc: Get ready for some monkey business! From proboscis monkeys, to howlers, baboons and macaques, Jack is counting down some of his favorite primates all the way to number one!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his family as they visit an Australian rainforest and have birds eating out of their hands. Then the whole family goes climbing to find out how life is like in the treetops and Jack discovers a rare wild bird.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Dirty Half-Dozen
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he uncovers some of the earthiest creatures in the world. Mud-loving elephants, nesting gators, burrowing penguins, sand-dwelling bee-eaters and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack on a whale-watching safari to Catalina Island where he meets a Humpback Whale, Fin Whale, loads of Dolphins, California Sea Lions, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Borneo has some of the most diverse wildlife on Earth, and Jack is there to find it! Join in as he explores Bako National Park on the South China Sea. This is a Malaysian adventure filled with snakes and lots more!
